The '''Gand starfighter''' was a heavily-modified [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bomber]] that was used by the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Characteristics==
Among the many modifications included having the bomb delivery system in the secondary hull replaced with a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launching system fed by a six-missile magazine; a [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivator]], a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation computer]], and [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] generators were also added. Two additional laser cannons completed their offensive systems, while the [[Quadanium steel/Legends|Quadanium]] solar panels on either side were cut out to resemble those on a [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]], with a central cutout to provide the pilot with vastly-improved peripheral vision.

==History==
A trio of Gand ''[[ruetsavii]]'' flew these [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] alongside the ex-members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and a squadron of [[Chir'daki]] during the [[Bacta War]], specifically to keep an eye on [[Ooryl Qrygg]], who was being observed for his worthiness to undergo ''[[janwuine-jika]]''. Throughout the conflict, these craft proved very useful despite their ungainly appearance; they downed their share of TIEs and aided [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]' forces on a number of ground-attack missions.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: The Bacta War (unabridged audiobook)}}
